topic: AI and Machine Learning in Nephrology

primary_sources.name: Artificial Intelligence in Nephrology: Core Concepts, Clinical Applications, and Perspectives
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of AI applications across all nephrology domains including AKI prediction and CKD management

primary_sources.name: Machine Learning for Acute Kidney Injury: Changing the Traditional Disease Prediction Paradigm
primary_sources.relevance: Focuses specifically on ML algorithms for AKI prediction and early detection models

primary_sources.name: Artificial Intelligence in Kidney Disease: A Comprehensive Review and Future Directions
primary_sources.organization: Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
primary_sources.relevance: Covers AI applications in kidney pathology interpretation, imaging analysis, and personalized treatment approaches

primary_sources.name: Digital Health and Artificial Intelligence in Kidney Disease: Current Applications and Future Perspectives
primary_sources.organization: Clinical Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
primary_sources.relevance: Addresses operational AI applications including dialysis unit management and workflow optimization

secondary_sources.name: FDA Guidance on Software as Medical Device for AI/ML-Based Medical Devices
secondary_sources.relevance: Regulatory framework for AI/ML medical devices applicable to nephrology applications

gaps: No specific KDIGO guidelines exist yet for AI/ML implementation in nephrology practice
Limited CMS guidance on reimbursement for AI-assisted nephrology care
Absence of standardized validation frameworks for nephrology AI applications
